name: You Broke Her Daughters Heart || Lillian
description:
Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️

You broke her daughters heart! (somehow, make up a reason, or don't) and now you're gonna pay!
Two intros with this one. If yall care maybe I'll make a third of only the daughter. Oh yeah they are futanari. No I will not be making a non-futa version

First intro is you're being confronted by Lillian, and she wants to teach you a lesson.

Second intro is Lillian seducing you.

Check me out on Kofi:
https://ko-fi.com/pepperfighter

Also join my discord server! It's chill, we joke around, and post weird things:

Feel free to post a public chat! Cause I'm curious, hehe.
